headline: Preiss and IRIS Technologies Introduce the Nation’s First Mobile Wallet Access Experience at an Off Campus Student Housing Community
summary: RALEIGH, N.C. & NORMAN, Okla., March 04, 2026--Preiss with IRIS Technologies launched the nation’s first off campus student housing community with a complete mobile wallet access experience.

headline: Allegion Acquires DCI Hollow Metal on Demand
summary: DUBLIN, March 04, 2026--Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE), a leading global security products and solutions provider, through one of its subsidiaries, has acquired privately held DCI Hollow Metal on Demand (DCI).
